desc: DetectionFindRadiatorPositionInRoomCommand — ribbon/bot wrapper over the canonical MCP read.
summary: DetectionFindRadiatorPositionInRoomCommand — ribbon/bot wrapper over the canonical MCP read.
usecase: Detection-driven positioning hint anchored to a room.
notfor: Actually placing a radiator — that's a Placement command.
precondition: Active document; room resolvable (resolver or single-element selection).
postcondition: No mutation; tracker records recommended position.
logictree:
1) Resolver_RoomId required OR single selected Room.
2) Delegate to DetectionFindRadiatorPositionInRoom.GetAll(doc, roomId).
3) Tracker output + TaskDialog on Human path.
